headline: The Pain For Housing And The U.S. Economy Is Just Beginning
summary: Housing market is poised to become a larger drag on the U.S. economy and consumer sentiment as 2026 progresses. Read full analysis here.

headline: Lennar: Statement on Land-Light Strategy
summary: Since our first quarter earnings call on March 13, 2026, we have been asked by several analysts and investors for information and explanation of various parts of our land light strategy, as well as our volume-prioritized operating strategy. We welcome this dialogue and offer the following in the interest of transparency and our commitment to consistent, open engagement with the public.
